description_long: This is a medium-sized stone obelisk set on a multi-tiered rectangular base, situated on a patch of grass. The obelisk features a tall, slender shaft with a square cross-section, rising from a series of stepped platforms that gradually decrease in size toward the top. The surface of the stone appears weathered, with visible discoloration and some erosion, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The front face of the obelisk displays an inscription panel, though the text is faint and partially illegible from a distance. The tip of the obelisk is flat and capped with a small, square stone block, lacking any pointed or ornate finial. The immediate surroundings consist of a grassy area bordered by a slightly raised, rectangular stone or concrete edging.
description: A weathered stone obelisk with a multi-tiered rectangular base and a flat-topped shaft, set on a grassy patch with a stone border.
description_view_0: Front view showing the inscription panel and the layered base with clear steps.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the weathered stone surface and the depth of the base's steps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain shaft and the rectangular base without visible inscriptions.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the inscription panel and the side of the base, with visible grass and edging.
attribute_inscription: There is an inscription panel on the front face of the obelisk, with faint, weathered text that is difficult to read. The style appears to be engraved, but the language and full content are not legible from the images.
attribute_base_design: The base consists of multiple rectangular stone steps, each slightly smaller than the one below, forming a tiered platform. The edges are straight and the surfaces are rough, with some discoloration and moss or dirt accumulation.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and capped with a small, square stone block, with no pointed or decorative features.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by a grassy patch bordered by a rectangular stone or concrete edging. No other notable features are present.
